Description.zh: 身处黑暗时，你无法造成伤害。

Description.en: Damage can only be dealt to targets inside the Void.
Description.zh: 只能对虚空内的怪物造成伤害。

Description.en: You have increased Attack Speed, Cast Speed and Damage.
Description.zh: 你的攻击速度和施法速度加快，伤害提高。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] You are within a Dark Tempest. Your spells are empowered with cold damage.
Description.zh: 你正身处暗潮风暴之中。你的法术被附加了冰霜伤害。

Description.en: You are taking Physical Damage over time.
Description.zh: 你正持续受到物理伤害。

Description.en: You are fighting against the darkness! Your movement speed against the flow is slowed, and you are taking Physical Damage over time.
Description.zh: 你正在与黑暗抗争！逆流而上时，你的移动速度降低，并且持续受到物理伤害。

Description.zh: 如果敌人生命值低于[CullingStrike|终结]阈值，你将传送至敌人所在位置，令其产生剧烈爆炸。

Description.zh: 你所造成的[Physical|物理][Attack|攻击]伤害会被储存，施放[Spell|法术]会创建一片[ThornyGround|荆棘地面]，对在其上移动的敌人造成存储的伤害。

Description.en: [Attack|Attacking] enemies builds Fury, and activating Savage Fury sends you into a frenzy which grants you damage and speed but causes you to lose life.
Description.zh: 通过[Attack|攻击]敌人积累狂怒值。激活凶蛮怒火将进入狂乱状态，获得伤害与速度加成但持续流失生命。

Description.en: You deal more damage and have [Onslaught], but constantly lose Life.
Description.zh: 你造成的伤害提高并获得[Onslaught|猛攻]，但会持续流失生命。

Description.en: You are taking Physical Damage over time while near the sphere of darkness.
Description.zh: 你正处于黑暗凝聚的范围内，受到持续的物理伤害。

Description.en: You are bringing the wrath of nature down upon your enemies.

Description.zh: 通过暴击获得极寒花瓣，并在积攒足够数量后将其消耗，以生成[IceCrystals|冰晶]。

Ignore [Grenade] Skill Cooldowns.

FinalStrike|Final Strikes] have 100% increased [Critical|Critical Hit Chance].
